allow: Bash(# Check the process info for 35133 ps -o pid=,tty=,command= -p 35133 echo -e ""\\n=== pgrep -x claude output ==="" pgrep -x claude echo -e ""\\n=== pgrep with full match ==="" pgrep -f ""^claude"" || echo ""none"" echo -e ""\\n=== All claude processes ==="" ps aux)

Bash(# Check if there''s a lock file or current session indicator ls -la ~/.claude/projects/-Users-buddy-repos-claude-code-skills/ echo -e ""\\n=== Check for any lock/current session files ==="" find ~/.claude -name ""*.lock"" -o -name ""current*"" -o -name ""active*"")
Bash(# Check the av project''s sessions index cat ~/.claude/projects/-Users-buddy-repos-av/sessions-index.json)
Bash(jq '.' echo -e "\\n=== What session files exist for av repo ===" ls -lt ~/.claude/projects/-Users-buddy-repos-av/*.jsonl)
Bash(# Check for any per-session state files ls -la /tmp/claude*)
